ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cotton_varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cotton variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the cotton variety */,
  "lint_yield" INTEGER /* Lint yield in pounds per acre */,
  "lint_percent" REAL /* Lint percentage */,
  "mic" REAL /* Micronaire value */,
  "staple_length" REAL /* Staple length in inches */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength in grams per tex */,
  "uniformity" REAL /* Uniformity percentage */,
  "leaf_grade" INTEGER /* Leaf grade */,
  "parent_variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent variety (if applicable) */,
  "shared_traits" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of traits shared with other varieties */,
  "history" TEXT /* Historical performance data and notes */,
  "breeder" TEXT /* Name of the breeder or organization that developed the variety */,
  "breeding_date" TEXT /* Date when the variety was developed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cotton_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cotton field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the cotton field */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cotton field */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the field */,
  "field_size" REAL /* Size of the cotton field in acres */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the field */,
  "irrigation_type" TEXT /* Type of irrigation system used */,
  "last_treatment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last treatment */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Details of the last treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cotton_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cotton field where the data was collected */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cotton variety being measured */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "lint_yield" INTEGER /* Lint yield in pounds per acre */,
  "lint_percent" REAL /* Lint percentage */,
  "mic" REAL /* Micronaire value */,
  "staple_length" REAL /* Staple length in inches */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength in grams per tex */,
  "uniformity" REAL /* Uniformity percentage */,
  "leaf_grade" INTEGER /* Leaf grade */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the measurement */,
  "disease_incidence" TEXT /* Incidence of any diseases observed */,
  "pest_incidence" TEXT /* Incidence of any pests observed */,
  "harvest_method" TEXT /* Method used for harvesting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cotton_data_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES cotton_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cotton_data_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES cotton_varieties ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variety_traits" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cotton variety */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id", "trait_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each cotton variety
Lint yield in pounds per acre
ID of the parent variety (if applicable)
Comma-separated list of traits shared with other varieties
Name of the breeder or organization that developed the variety
Date when the variety was developed
